targets.queryText: SELECT TOP3_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT TOP3_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT TOP5_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT TOP5_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT herfindahl_index AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT herfindahl_index AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT UPPER(concentration_category) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT UPPER(concentration_category) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, weight_pct AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 10;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, weight_pct AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 10;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, TOP3_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, TOP3_weight_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC;
